title: New `create_doc` mutation

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Due to popular demand, we’re excited to present the brand new create_doc mutation that allows you to create a new doc in a document column! Check out the documentation and give it a try 

mutation {
  create_doc (location: { board: {item_id: 1234567890, column_id: "monday_doc"}}) {
    id
  }
}

posts.author: dreww (drew rockmore)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to change the document name from “Untitled” on creation? I read through the docs and did not see any mentions for modifying the document name.

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @dreww,

Welcome to the community!

At this moment, we don’t support that, but I gave the team your feature request Let us know if you have any other questions.

Best,
Rachel

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
monday.monday.com

Welcome to monday.com | a new way of working

monday.com Work OS is an open platform where anyone can create the tools they need to run every aspect of their work.

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @dreww,

Just wanted to follow up directly

We just added the option to create a new document in a workspace. When creating the doc there, you have the option to create a custom name. I still put in that feature request to create a doc with a custom name in a monday doc column.

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml: 2 posts were split to a new topic: How to create a doc and add content to it?
